facts.subject: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999
facts.object: the difference between quotations or prices on the world market for the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of that Regulation and prices for those products within the Community may be covered by an export refund
facts.natural_language: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that the difference between world market quotations or prices for listed products and Community prices may be covered by an export refund.

source_locator.quote: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that the difference between quotations or prices on the world market for the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of that Regulation and prices for those products within the Community may be covered by an export refund.

extra.model_quote: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that the difference between quotations or prices on the world market for the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of that Regulation and prices for those products within the Community may be covered by an export refund.

facts.subject: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999
facts.object: when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation
facts.natural_language: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 requires that when fixing refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation.

source_locator.quote: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation

extra.model_quote: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation

facts.subject: the same Article
facts.object: the economic aspect of the proposed exports should also be taken into account
facts.natural_language: Article 19 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that the economic aspect of the proposed exports should also be taken into account.

source_locator.quote: whereas the same Article provides that the economic aspect of the proposed exports should also be taken into account

extra.model_quote: whereas the same Article provides that the economic aspect of the proposed exports should also be taken into account

facts.subject: the refund on raw sugar
facts.predicate: must be fixed in respect of
facts.natural_language: The refund on raw sugar must be fixed in respect of the standard quality.

source_locator.quote: The refund on raw sugar must be fixed in respect of the standard quality

extra.model_quote: The refund on raw sugar must be fixed in respect of the standard quality

facts.subject: the standard quality for raw sugar
facts.object: Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968
facts.natural_language: The standard quality for raw sugar is defined in Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968.

source_locator.quote: the latter is defined in Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968

extra.model_quote: the latter is defined in Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968

facts.subject: Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968
facts.natural_language: Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968 was amended by Regulation (EC) No 3290/94.

source_locator.quote: determining the standard quality for raw sugar and fixing the Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar(3), as amended by Regulation (EC) No 3290/94(4)

extra.model_quote: determining the standard quality for raw sugar and fixing the Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar(3), as amended by Regulation (EC) No 3290/94(4)

facts.subject: the refund on raw sugar
facts.predicate: should be fixed in accordance with
facts.natural_language: The refund on raw sugar should be fixed in accordance with Article 19(4) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999.

source_locator.quote: furthermore, this refund should be fixed in accordance with Article 19(4) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999

extra.model_quote: furthermore, this refund should be fixed in accordance with Article 19(4) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999

facts.subject: candy sugar
facts.natural_language: Candy sugar is defined in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995.

source_locator.quote: candy sugar is defined in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995

facts.subject: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995
facts.object: detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector
facts.natural_language: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995 lays down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector.

source_locator.quote: laying down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector(5)

extra.model_quote: laying down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector(5)

facts.subject: the refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter
facts.natural_language: The refund calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content.

source_locator.quote: the refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content

extra.model_quote: the refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content

facts.subject: the refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter
facts.natural_language: The refund calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must be fixed per 1 % of the said content.

source_locator.quote: and, accordingly, be fixed per 1 % of the said content.

extra.model_quote: and, accordingly, be fixed per 1 % of the said content.

facts.subject: world market situation
facts.object: to vary the refund for sugar according to destination
facts.natural_language: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

source_locator.quote: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

extra.model_quote: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

facts.subject: specific requirements of certain markets
facts.object: to vary the refund for sugar according to destination
facts.natural_language: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

extra.model_quote: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

facts.subject: the amount of the refund
facts.natural_language: In special cases, the amount of the refund may be fixed by other legal instruments.

source_locator.quote: In special cases, the amount of the refund may be fixed by other legal instruments.

extra.model_quote: In special cases, the amount of the refund may be fixed by other legal instruments.

facts.subject: the export refund
facts.natural_language: The export refund must be fixed every two weeks.

source_locator.quote: The refund must be fixed every two weeks

extra.model_quote: The refund must be fixed every two weeks

facts.subject: the export refund
facts.natural_language: The export refund may be altered in the intervening period.

source_locator.quote: it may be altered in the intervening period

extra.model_quote: it may be altered in the intervening period

facts.subject: the refund
facts.object: as set out in the Annex hereto
facts.natural_language: The refund for sugar exported in its unaltered state should be as set out in the Annex hereto.

facts.subject: the export refunds on the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999
facts.object: the amounts shown in the Annex hereto
facts.natural_language: The export refunds on the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999, undenatured and exported in the natural state, are hereby fixed to the amounts shown in the Annex hereto.

facts.subject: This Regulation
facts.natural_language: This Regulation shall enter into force on 14 June 2001.

source_locator.quote: This Regulation shall enter into force on 14 June 2001.

extra.model_quote: This Regulation shall enter into force on 14 June 2001.

facts.subject: This Regulation
facts.natural_language: This Regulation shall be binding in its entirety and directly applicable in all Member States.
